wins: Q3 revenue above midpoint of guidance
Significant progress on cost reduction plan
Improved operational performance across Intel Foundry and Intel Products
Strong product roadmap and ecosystem for AIPC
Positive revenue growth in DCAI and NEX segments
risks: Negative impact on Q3 profitability from restructuring charges
Slower-than-expected adoption of Gaudi 3 AI accelerator
Uncertainty around 2024 free cash flow due to restructuring charges
Potential margin pressures from new product designs like Lunar Lake
